name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Headed to THE WALL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I’ll be in El Paso TOMORROW. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab5233f9e6a423b47e8bacd9b55995142944f59890161f2d7576dff402df6e7e5e4694166b7a1f57132f2aa76a7e4624994)
---

Friend,

I'm headed to El Paso, Texas, tomorrow for a huge rally at our Southern Border to show Democrats how much Americans demand _THE WALL._

While Democrats refuse to acknowledge the crisis at our Southern Border, the safety of Americans is threatened every day....

Just a few days ago, an MS-13 gang member was taken into custody for a fatal shooting on a subway platform in New York City. We're removing these gang members by the thousands, _**but until we secure our border they're going to keep streaming back in.**_

Even with this knowledge, Democrats have chosen petty games over the safety of Americans.

During my State of the Union Address, I called for unity, asking Democrats to finally choose _greatness_ over _gridlock._

With Congress' deadline to fund the wall on February 15th, I need you to help put pressure on the Democrats and become an Official Build the Wall Member.

| **[Please contribute at least $5 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to become an Official Build The Wall Member and get on the list my team sends me tonight. ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab570898bcba5de93f4baf90c3f308e4acf952d3d774b468fe158c4118c02354dec916b8cd2028a8f83607e8d4f70752be9)** **[Official Build The Wall Membership](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab5ff5f58f55805b1205c88ee8197f4ddee3670027304ff3acd9e03e91b51c0ec4beee89e1a4269530b11e040073c845d3d)** **EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab5a25f5ea0389e29a56fdbcf8d6d1fc1cdca1ab2460a04bb5e81a4cd0e16ce5d22adb90b461260898d11f10d23770fec23)**
**ACCOUNT NUMBER: 6124335 - 2019
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT**
**MEMBERSHIP:****PENDING** ************************[ **CONTRIBUTE $5** ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab51988196bcfaffb947995fa6e5c24da8d9b5c9d57a63f278a4472faebd3e641d948a35d0e4f11bc3ffb0e16febd213bf5)************************
[CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab5b6cec37f5b36f03a6e3da018a1a55033f33eea1960db94585448f440724b33481ca3b639b5d0f499ad60baea4cf22fa3) [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab5f43af42fd22efc5c24eb3070f1a965c2e6ba06040dcc0614c954632540124282bfbe69ae74a07c963b1b74e28925d19d) [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab51d856d103736246ce35bb0196960f434c45fa142b31ef1a9486ccc48bc44025bc9e31b9dec190607302c23384ba989f7) [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab5d33947dbdbfc5bd8500494f1781541deee3a8a6037b7b5957739311123aa30ba7d4c97582c5efce2b0af8178e49be936) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab5b8e5e666d873028feee1d560a4e43fc2c3ecd22b8caab11f8a2c06ff747fe422e8c4d5757ea5e3af8137c37807c0d840) The time for action is NOW, we can't sit back and continue to let the Democrats put the safety of American citizens at risk.

Go down in history as an Official Build The Wall Member, and be remembered for being one of the American Patriots that helped FINISH THE WALL.

**[Please contribute at least $5 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to become an Official Build The Wall Member and get on the list my team sends me tonight.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab5aba640a3eaf3b7c59d6f51df22c591eb1a193d26d87d96824c9dd49db58c6e17ac6318beeed34bbf61eb912a9fb5cfda)**

Thank you, [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab5c48afd9c741fd589ff230152ce657e585bb420985753bcb39f2891b1cc5eba2a187a9c6af237d8c039dbaa1b28de7a7f)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=6839bf7780c6dab52978b341ac5128ace973bff044b98e013726c51e91a49cc2781ccad13de62b262e4cf41f33c7ca34ce6a6faa0483a11e)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: "Live from New York..."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

In case you missed it, Saturday Night Live aired a sketch last night called "[The Women of Congress](https://act.myngp.com/el/kMfhCfvPbjsTzfCa-geeHViLjznIxjR9Acb37XqwAfo=/nGXQNVcPwyVo1FVZXM68r2-WbnIPn5poudrHYgsVkvU=)," a lighthearted take on the newly-elected and long-serving women currently serving in the House and Senate. To my shocked surprise, I was one of the 8 women featured.

The bit referred to me as Abigail "Say My Name, Say My Name" Spanberger, a reference to the now-viral [closing statement](https://act.myngp.com/el/kMfhCfvPbjsTzfCa-geeHViLjznIxjR9Acb37XqwAfo=/NksECQTP5usiCtwIwL6N0b3kMvuv-gXxczyjTydfzkY=?lang=en) I gave during my campaign debate. I wasn't able to stay up to see it live, but when I watched it this morning, I had a good laugh. Then I re-watched it a few more times, and once the shock wore off, I was overcome by an entirely different feeling.

Gratitude. Not for SNL, but for you, Peter.

The thing is, I don't really care about being on TV; that's not why I pursued this role in government. But the fact that Saturday Night Live is calling attention to our victory illustrates the magnitude of what we accomplished together. We have an incredibly diverse and passionate class of first-term lawmakers this year because of people like you - people who followed and supported our campaigns.

And now, I'm part of a force of women in Congress whose hard work representing their districts and standing up for the American people - be it for decades or just weeks - is so strong that we have become SNL worthy!

I've appreciated the laugh, and I will keep the skit in my mind as I head back to D.C. tomorrow. My colleagues and I are eager to get back to addressing top priority issues, like lowering the cost of prescription drugs, reducing gun violence, and finding common ground on infrastructure and environmental issues. It's not exactly scaling buildings, but it's what we got elected to do!

Thank you so much, Peter. For everything.

-Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kMfhCfvPbjsTzfCa-geeHViLjznIxjR9Acb37XqwAfo=/w7ux3Ca4OoD5no7r51Rb9SVzHdJAcQvZzjXGjnFuIYQ=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kMfhCfvPbjsTzfCa-geeHViLjznIxjR9Acb37XqwAfo=/w7ux3Ca4OoD5no7r51Rb9SVzHdJAcQvZzjXGjnFuIYQ=)
Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/kMfhCfvPbjsTzfCa-geeHViLjznIxjR9Acb37XqwAfo=/x_x8LigN9gVqT_4Bd459z776SMyjDRS6rx3caP3Sv9g=).

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I'm running for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
If it matters to your family, I'll fight for it.
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769d2/2ae112ef/17180e3c/357a64e8/14448296/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769d2/2ae112ef/17180e3c/357a64e8/14448296/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter, there's one question I'm asked everywhere I go: Why are you running? And the truth is I'm running for you. I'm in this to restore courage and compassion to our leadership and to fight for your family as hard as I fight for my own.
I've spent the last three weeks traveling across Iowa, New Hampshire and South Carolina--packing into diners, coffee shops and breweries with people who want to be heard. People who need affordable health care, good schools for their kids, college that doesn't send them deep into debt and the security of a good job.
I'm listening, and I'm ready to fight. Together we're building a winning campaign that is community-led and grounded in your stories. A campaign that can win. I want to make sure I hear what keeps you fighting and the direction you want to see our country go. **Will you take a quick minute to share your thoughts with me? Here 's a link: **
[Take The Survey](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/priorities-survey-2?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2715-su-gfp-nd")
Thank you for being such an important part of our movement.
Kirsten
P.S. Here's a photo from last weekend at jajaBelle's in New Hampshire. Enjoyed some great conversation, especially connecting with other moms-and the coffee, too!

[Contribute](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769d2/2ae112ef/17180e3c/357a64ea/14448296/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3MTUtc3UtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2715-su-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769d2/2ae112ef/17180e3c/357a64d5/14448296/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
